name: Jean-Luc Rousseau
bio: With over 20 years of experience in Michelin-starred kitchens across Paris and New York, Chef Jean-Luc brings classical French techniques to our students.

name: Elena Rossi
bio: Elena is an award-winning pastry artist known for her exquisite desserts that blend traditional Italian flavors with modern architectural designs.

name: Kenji Tanaka
bio: Kenji brings the discipline of Tokyo's finest sushi bars to our academy, teaching the delicate art of knife skills and rice preparation.

name: Sarah Jenkins
bio: Sarah holds a Master of Wine certification and travels the globe sourcing rare vintages to teach our students about perfect pairings.

name: Marcus Thorne
bio: A master of sourdough and fermentation, Marcus teaches the science and patience required to create world-class breads.

name: Priya Patel
bio: Priya specializes in modern vegetarian cuisine, transforming traditional recipes into vibrant, nutrient-dense works of art.
